   "reasoning": "I'm worried that my family will ask me to drop out if things don't get better, so I think the school should do everything it can to keep me and my friends in school, like giving us scholarships and hiring more teachers and counselors to support us. I don't care about reports, I care about results, so I don't think the school should waste time and money on transparency reports. I just want to learn and have a better life, so I think the school should focus on helping students like me.",
